parameters.query: WITH r AS (UPDATE conversations SET unread_count = 0 WHERE id = ($1)::bigint RETURNING id) SELECT id, conversation_id, direction, type, text, template, media_url, media_mime, media_filename, (media_data IS NOT NULL) AS has_blob, status, channel, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM created_at)*1000 AS timestamp FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = ($1)::bigint ORDER BY created_at ASC;
